comment: Allowlisted governance signing keys (plan replay-corpus-gate-2026-07, Item 2 governance + bootstrap step 1 GENESIS). Governance events (expiry_extension, required_green→superseded, *→privacy_quarantined) are verified against THIS file AT THE TARGET-BRANCH/BASE COMMIT, never the PR head — a PR-head read would let a contributor add their own key and authorize a transition in the same PR. An allowlist change is itself a governance event signed by a key ALREADY in the base allowlist; rotation and any transition it authorizes can never share a PR. GENESIS exception: when no base allowlist exists, the first entry's signed Foundation commit OID + fingerprint are verified directly via gh api. Derek chose OPTION (b) — GPG/SSH-signed governance-event commits (Resolved decisions, 2026-07-16 post-cap); the machine-account two-phase protocol stays the documented fallback only.
